# QLPreviewProvider | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Quick Look ](/documentation/quicklook)

- [ QLPreviewProvider ](/documentation/QuickLook/QLPreviewProvider)

-  QLPreviewProvider 

Class# QLPreviewProvider

iOS 15.0+iPadOS 15.0+Mac Catalyst 15.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
class QLPreviewProvider
```

## [Overview](/documentation/QuickLook/QLPreviewProvider#overview)

Data-based preview extensions should subclass QLPreviewProvider in their principal object. The subclass should conform to QLPreviewingController.

## [Relationships](/documentation/QuickLook/QLPreviewProvider#relationships)

## [See Also](/documentation/QuickLook/QLPreviewProvider#see-also)

### [QuickLookUI symbols](/documentation/QuickLook/QLPreviewProvider#QuickLookUI-symbols)

[`class QLFilePreviewRequest`](/documentation/quicklook/qlfilepreviewrequest)[`class QLPreviewReply`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreply)[`class QLPreviewReplyAttachment`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewreplyattachment)[`protocol QLPreviewItem`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewitem)[`protocol QLPreviewingController`](/documentation/quicklook/qlpreviewingcontroller)For view based previews, the view controller that implements the QLPreviewingController protocol must at least implement one of the two following methods: -[QLPreviewingController preparePreviewOfSearchableItemWithIdentifier:queryString:completionHandler:], to generate previews for Spotlight searchable items. -[QLPreviewingController preparePreviewOfFileAtURL:completionHandler:], to generate previews for file URLs.
